_comment: Example MCP client configuration for it-is-unreal. Copy the relevant section to your MCP client's config file. Replace /absolute/path/to/it-is-unreal with the actual path where you cloned this repository.

claude-desktop._location: Merge mcpServers into claude_desktop_config.json. Location varies by OS: macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json, Windows: %APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json

pip-install._location: Alternative: install the server as a Python package, then reference the installed entry point directly

cursor._location: Add to .cursor/mcp.json in your project root, or ~/.cursor/mcp.json globally

custom-host._location: If your Unreal Editor is on a different machine, override the host and port via environment variables
